description: Yukari is a modern, extensible comic and manga reader for Windows. Built with WinUI 3 and .NET 10, it features a plugin-based architecture for dynamic source integration and a fast, local SQLite-backed library.
notes: Yukari.Minimal requires manually installing .NET Desktop Runtime . You can download it from the following link:
Alternatively, you can install it from Scoop, but you will need admin privileges: extras/windowsdesktop-runtime
